name: Press Conference EN/FR
description: Bilingual press conference: opening remarks, multiple speakers, Q&A, closing.

cues.label: Pre-Roll / Holding Slate
cues.notes: Display while waiting for start time. Unmute only when live.

cues.label: Opening Remarks
cues.notes: Host or MC introduces the event and confirms bilingual feed.

cues.label: Speaker 1
cues.notes: First designated speaker. Apply lower third with name/title.

cues.label: Q&A Session
cues.notes: Questions from journalists. Wide shot preferred. Clear lower third.

cues.label: Closing Remarks
cues.notes: MC closes the event. Title card back on screen.

cues.label: Post-Roll / End Slate
cues.notes: Hold until stream ends. Mute microphones.
